app.name: CodeCloud
app.tagline: Bouw, voer uit en deploy code van overal.
language.switcher.label: Taal
errors.generic: Er is iets misgegaan. Probeer het opnieuw.
errors.network: Kan geen verbinding maken met de server.
errors.unauthorized: Je moet ingelogd zijn om dit te doen.
errors.notFound: We konden niet vinden waar je naar zocht.
errors.validation: Controleer de gemarkeerde velden en probeer opnieuw.
errors.server: Serverfout. Ons team is op de hoogte.
email.welcome.subject: Welkom bij CodeCloud!
email.welcome.body: Hallo {{name}}, welkom bij CodeCloud! Begin vandaag nog met coderen.
email.passwordReset.subject: Wachtwoord opnieuw instellen
email.passwordReset.body: Klik op de link om je wachtwoord opnieuw in te stellen. De link verloopt over {{expiresIn}}.
email.deploy.subject: {{project}} gedeployd
email.lowCredits.subject: Waarschuwing: weinig credits
landing.hero.title: Code anywhere. Ship everywhere.
landing.hero.subtitle: A complete development environment in your browser. Powered by AI, available in {{count}}+ languages.
errors.payment: Your payment could not be processed.
errors.quota: You have reached your plan limits.
errors.auth.locked: Account locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
errors.auth.lockedJustNow: Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 15 minutes.
errors.auth.oauthOnly: This account uses {{provider}} login. Please sign in with {{provider}}.
errors.auth.passwordOauth: Cannot change password for OAuth accounts.
errors.auth.resetTokenInvalid: Invalid or expired reset token. Please request a new password reset.
errors.auth.resetTokenExpired: Reset token has expired. Please request a new password reset.
admin.i18n.title: Translation coverage
admin.i18n.subtitle: Track translation completeness across all supported locales.

auth.login.subtitle: Log in op je account om door te gaan
